components.name: Button
components.description: Primary action button with a solid Primary Navy background and white label. Use for the main call-to-action on a screen. Height 40px, horizontal padding 20px, border radius 8px.

variants.name: Default
variants.description: Solid Primary Navy background with white Inter Semi Bold label

properties.name: label
properties.description: Button text displayed in white Inter Semi Bold 14px

do: Use for the single most important action on a screen
Keep label text concise — ideally 1–3 words
Ensure sufficient contrast against the page background
dont: Do not use more than one primary button in a single view
Do not use for destructive or secondary actions
Do not use for navigation — use a link or secondary control instead

components.name: Text Input
components.description: A labelled text input field. Composed of a 13px Semi Bold label above a 40px input with white background, #E0E2E6 border, 8px border radius, and 14px horizontal padding. Placeholder text uses color-text-muted.

variants.name: Default
variants.description: Unfocused state with label and placeholder text

properties.name: label
properties.description: Field label shown above the input in Inter Medium 13px

properties.name: placeholder
properties.description: Placeholder text shown in the input when empty, styled with color-text-muted

properties.name: onChange
properties.description: Change handler called with the new input value

do: Always include a visible label above the input
Use placeholder text to indicate format, not as a replacement for the label
Pair with an error state and message when validation fails
dont: Do not rely on placeholder text alone to communicate the field purpose
Do not disable the field without indicating why elsewhere on the page
Do not show validation errors before the user has interacted with the field

components.name: Card
components.description: A content container with a white background, #E0E2E6 border, 12px border radius, and 16px padding on all sides. Contains a 16px Semi Bold title and a 14px Regular body text in color-text-muted. Items are spaced 6px apart.

variants.name: Default
variants.description: White card with title and body text, bordered with a 1px #E0E2E6 stroke

properties.name: title
properties.description: Card heading displayed in Inter Semi Bold 16px using color-text-primary

properties.name: description
properties.description: Supporting body text in Inter Regular 14px using color-text-muted

do: Use to group related content into a visually distinct container
Keep the title short and descriptive — one line where possible
Use the description for supporting detail, not as a duplicate of the title
dont: Do not nest cards inside other cards
Do not use cards for navigation — they are content containers
Do not omit the title — it is the primary label for the content

components.codeSnippet:
<Card
  title="Card title"
  description="Brief description that sits inside the card."
/>

components.name: Bottom Nav Bar
components.description: A fixed bottom navigation bar with four items: Home, Search, Activity, and Profile. White background, #E0E2E6 top border, 12px border radius, 16px horizontal and 12px vertical padding. Active item uses color-primary-navy; inactive items use color-text-muted.

variants.name: Default
variants.description: Four navigation items with one active (Home) and three inactive states

properties.name: activeItem
properties.description: The key of the currently active navigation item — one of: home, search, activity, profile

properties.name: onItemPress
properties.description: Callback fired with the item key when a navigation item is tapped

do: Keep exactly four navigation items — the component is designed for a fixed four-item layout
Use color-primary-navy on the active item icon and label to communicate the current location
Pair with a fixed bottom position so the bar remains visible while scrolling
dont: Do not use more or fewer than four items
Do not use the bottom nav bar for secondary or contextual actions
Do not place the bottom nav bar inside a scrollable container
